concerns.text: Missing task for SC-001 (Dataset completeness). The spec requires logging a 'Limited Power' warning and reporting the calculated margin of error if the dataset is between 100 and 500 rows. Tasks T012-T017 cover the abort logic (E-DATA-001) and generation, but no task explicitly implements the warning/logging logic for the 100-500 range.

Missing task for SC-002 (Model training feasibility) regarding the specific 'checkpoint and resume' logic for the 4.5h-6h window. Task T025 mentions 'timeout logic (hard fail >6h)' but does not explicitly include a task to implement the 'checkpoint and resume' mechanism required by the spec's acceptance scenario 1 for the 4.5h-6h window.

Missing task for SC-003 (Statistical significance) regarding the specific '95th percentile' calculation. Task T031 implements the permutation test, but no task explicitly covers the calculation of the 0.95 quantile of the permuted baseline to determine p < 0.05, which is the core of SC-003.

Missing task for SC-004 (Collinearity) regarding the specific 'std > 0.1' threshold check. Task T034 mentions identifying features with std > 0.1, but SC-004 requires the GNN to 'demonstrate ability to handle correlated features via attention weights'. No task explicitly implements or logs the verification of this attention-weight behavior as a success criterion.

Missing task for SC-005 (Multiple-comparison correction). Task T035 applies Bonferroni/Holm correction, but SC-005 requires the system to 'measure against family-wise error rate control'. There is no task explicitly calculating or reporting the family-wise error rate (FWER) to verify the correction was effective, only the application of the correction itself.

Stale tag reference: Task T007 mentions 'MolecularGraph' and 'InterfacePair' entities. While these are defined in the spec, the task description is vague ('Create base data structures'). It lacks a specific tag like [FR-002] or [US-1] to link it clearly to the spec's entity requirements, making traceability ambiguous.
